description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, release, and deploy, using the global image jamesdbloom/docker-java8-maven. In the build stage add a job named build that runs ./mvnw -Pprod package, then archives the generated target/*.war as an artifact that expires after 1 hour. In the release stage add a job named docker:push that runs only on the master branch, uses the docker:stable image with the docker:dind service, depends on the build job, moves the WAR to jhipster-registry.war, logs in to GCR with the _json_key and $GCLOUD_KEY, builds a Docker image ${DOCKER_IMAGE}, pushes it to the registry, and keeps an artifact for 1 hour. In the deploy stage add a job named kubernetes:deploy that also runs only on master, uses the google/cloud-sdk:latest image, runs before_script apt-get update and apt-get --assume-yes install gettext, depends on docker:push, writes $GCLOUD_KEY to key.json, authenticates with gcloud, fetches GKE credentials for ${K8S_CLUSTER} in ${K8S_ZONE} of ${K8S_PROJECT}, copies k8s manifests, and executes ./deploy.sh ${APP_NAME} prod ${DOCKER_IMAGE} prod targeting the prod environment. Define variables APP_NAME, DOCKER_IMAGE, K8S_CLUSTER, K8S_PROJECT, and K8S_ZONE for use across the jobs.
